title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at MakeMyTrip

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at MakeMyTrip
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? MakeMyTrip in Meerut offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About MakeMyTrip:
MakeMyTrip is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MakeMyTrip!
